user_stories.title: Postgres Store Migration
user_stories.description: Replace SQLite with Postgres using pgx and goose migrations
acceptance_criteria: mozza serve --db-url postgres://... connects to Postgres
mozza operator --db-url postgres://... connects to Postgres
All existing store operations work against Postgres

user_stories.title: API Security Hardening
user_stories.description: Lock all API endpoints behind auth, secure cookies, rate limiting
acceptance_criteria: Only /health, /version, and auth endpoints are public
Session cookie sets Secure: true over HTTPS
Auth endpoints rate-limited at 10 req/min per IP

user_stories.title: Cluster Management API
user_stories.description: CRUD API for K8s clusters with AES-GCM encrypted credentials
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/clusters creates cluster with encrypted kubeconfig
Kubeconfig encrypted with AES-GCM using MOZZA_ENCRYPTION_KEY

user_stories.title: Operator Process
user_stories.description: mozza operator command with PG LISTEN/NOTIFY deployment pickup
acceptance_criteria: mozza operator is a Cobra subcommand
Uses PG LISTEN on deployments channel
Queries for pending deployments on NOTIFY
Uses SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED for concurrency

user_stories.title: Docker Compose Execution
acceptance_criteria: Operator runs docker compose up -d for local/docker-compose targets
Writes docker-compose.yml from recipe before executing
Failed execution sets status to failed

user_stories.title: Kubernetes Execution via client-go
user_stories.description: Operator applies K8s manifests using client-go
acceptance_criteria: Uses client-go for kubernetes target deployments
Creates K8s client from decrypted kubeconfig
Generates manifests using existing K8s compiler
Captures apply results in deployment log
Tests cover execution flow with mocked client

user_stories.title: Deployment Trigger + PG NOTIFY
user_stories.description: API creates deployments and notifies operator via PG NOTIFY
acceptance_criteria: Request validates team membership, recipe, cluster

user_stories.title: Cluster Management UI Page
user_stories.description: React page for managing K8s clusters
acceptance_criteria: Lists clusters with name and status
Add Cluster form with name and kubeconfig

user_stories.title: Deploy Trigger UI
user_stories.description: UI for triggering and monitoring deployments
acceptance_criteria: Deploy button on recipe detail page
Deployment detail page shows status and logs

user_stories.title: Comprehensive Test Suite
acceptance_criteria: Crypto tests verify round-trip and error cases
Operator tests verify PG LISTEN/NOTIFY flow
API tests cover auth on all protected endpoints

decisions.cluster_credentials: Stored in DB, encrypted at rest, configurable via API/UI
decisions.config: MOZZA_DATABASE_URL env var shared by serve and operator
